briefdescription.para: Minimum byte alignment requirement for descriptors.
Minimum word alignment requirement for descriptors.
Maximum number of the frame store.
Maximum # of the frame store for 64 bit.

description.para: Register sets on TX (Read) and RX (Write) channels are identical
The version register is shared by both channels

sectiondef.header: Start Addresses Register Array for a Channel

description.para: Base offset is set in each channel This set of registers are write only, they can be read when C_ENABLE_VIDPRMTR_READS is 1.
This register reports status of a DMA channel, including run/stop/idle state, errors, and interrupts
These masks are shared by the XAXIVDMA_CR_OFFSET register and the XAXIVDMA_SR_OFFSET register

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and shift for delay and coalesce

description.para: These masks are shared by the XAXIVDMA_CR_OFFSET register and the XAXIVDMA_SR_OFFSET register

briefdescription.para: Masks S2MM IRQ FSize Less/SOF Early Error.
Masks S2MM IRQ LSize Less/EOL Early Error.
Masks S2MM IRQ FSize More/SOF Late Error.
Masks S2MM IRQ LSize More/EOL Late Error.

sectiondef.header: Frame Delay shared by start address registers and BDs

briefdescription.para: Total number of words for one BD.
Frame/Line Mismatch Error This is a typical DMA Internal Error, which on detection does not require a reset (as opposed to other errors).

detaileddescription.para: So a MSB bit is set to identify it, from other DMA Internal Errors.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XAxiVdma_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XAxiVdma_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
